allow: Bash(psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U freewrite -d freewrite -c "SELECT id, \\"order\\", title FROM phase ORDER BY \\"order\\";")
Bash(psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U freewrite -d freewrite -c "SELECT id, phase_id, \\"order\\", assignment_type, title FROM journey_step ORDER BY \\"order\\" LIMIT 20;")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Port 8081 held by PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $\($p.Id\)" } } } else { "No process listening on 8081" })
